pullRequest.title: 改进本地媒体检查，避免因特定的重命名格式导致额外的扫盘
pullRequest.body:
Fix #4508
当电视剧配置以下重命名格式
`{{title}}/Season {{season}}/{{season_episode}}{{fileExt}}`

在判定本地是否存在媒体文件时，构造的元数据`MetaInfo`仅使用了剧名，导致season_episode、fileExt属性为空白，
重命名后的路径变成`/媒体库路径/剧名/Season /`。

由于`pathlib`会移除末尾的斜杠，变成`/媒体库路径/剧名/Season `
这会导致mp误将`/媒体库路径`作为剧集目录，产生超出预期范围的扫盘。

这种大范围的扫盘，还会误报该剧的媒体文件已存在，影响订阅行为。

pullRequest.title: refactor(media): 引入配置化刮削策略
pullRequest.body:
## 主要变更：
- 新增 ScrapingOption 类：统一管理刮削类型、元数据类型和刮削策略
- 新增 ScrapingConfig 类：支持从系统配置加载刮削配置，提供默认配置
- MediaChain 改为单例模式，集成 ConfigReloadMixin 支持配置热重载
- 重构刮削逻辑为独立方法：
  - _should_scrape: 统一刮削决策逻辑
  - _save_file: 文件保存/上传逻辑
  - _download_and_save_image: 图片流式下载保存
  - _get_target_fileitem_and_path: 目标文件路径计算
  - _scrape_nfo_generic: NFO 刮削通用逻辑
  - _scrape_images_generic: 图片刮削通用逻辑
- 引入 ScrapingTarget/ScrapingMetadata/ScrapingPolicy 枚举类型
- 移除内联函数，提升代码可维护性和可读性

## 技术改进：
- 刮削策略支持 SKIP/MISSINGONLY/OVERWRITE 三种模式
- 支持配置变更时自动重载刮削策略

pullRequest.title: add hard-link support for smb
pullRequest.body: fix: #5191 ## Note samba supports hard link by default unless samba server explicitly set `unix extensions = no` https://www.samba.org/samba/docs/current/man-html/smb.conf.5.html#UNIXEXTENSIONS ## What about soft-link? symlink(soft link) is not supported by samba server due to security issue. except for following two exceptions: 1. Windows symlink (Only works on windows with admin users, `FSCTL_SET_REPARSE_POINT`) 2. [Minshall+French symlinks](https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/UNIX_Extensions#Minshall+French_symlinks) But they are not suitable for our cases.

feat: 适配Rousi新站点
pullRequest.body:
## 📝 变更说明
本 PR 适配了Rousi新站点，并对最大搜索别名数量进行了调整。

### ✨ 主要功能 (Features)
1.  **新增 RousiPro 站点支持**
    *   实现了该站点的爬虫 (`Spider`) 和解析器 (`Parser`)。
    *   完整支持站点分类映射与搜索参数过滤，确保资源检索的准确性。
    *   在站点管理中新增了对 `rousi.pro` 的连通性测试。

2.  **扩大搜索范围**
    *   将最大搜索别名数量限制 (`MAX_SEARCH_NAME_LIMIT`) 从 2 提升至 3，确保包含英文标题 (`en_title`)，以提高对多语言资源的匹配成功率。

Closes #5324

pullRequest.title: fix: 修复订阅自定义识别词在整理时不生效的问题
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
- 修复订阅中的自定义识别词（特别是集数偏移）在下载完成整理时不生效的问题
- 在 DownloadHistory 模型中添加 custom_words 字段，保存下载时应用的识别词
- 修改 MetaInfoPath 支持 custom_words 参数，整理时从下载历史获取并传递识别词

## Changes
- `app/db/models/downloadhistory.py`: 添加 `custom_words` 字段
- `app/chain/download.py`: 下载时保存 `custom_words` 到下载历史
- `app/core/metainfo.py`: `MetaInfoPath()` 支持 `custom_words` 参数
- `app/chain/transfer.py`: 整理时从下载历史获取 `custom_words` 并传递给 MetaInfoPath
- `database/versions/58edfac72c32_2_2_3.py`: 数据库迁移脚本
- `tests/test_metainfo.py` & `tests/run.py`: 添加单元测试

## Test plan
- [x] 单元测试通过 (8/8)
- [ ] 创建订阅并添加集数偏移识别词
- [ ] 触发订阅搜索并下载资源
- [ ] 验证下载历史中 custom_words 字段已保存
- [ ] 触发整理，验证集数偏移正确生效

Closes #5341

fix(workflow): allow decimal rating in filter medias action
pullRequest.body:
Closes #5442

## Summary
- Change `FilterMediasParams.vote` from `Optional[int]` to `Optional[float]`.
- This allows decimal rating values (e.g. `7.5`) in workflow '过滤媒体数据' action.

## Why
Issue #5442 reports validation failure when using decimal rating thresholds. The action already compares against `media.vote_average` (float), so accepting float input matches actual usage.

## Risk
Low: one-parameter type adjustment only; no behavior change for integer inputs.

pullRequest.title: fix(filemanager): avoid false diagnostic failure when transfer is disabled
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
Fix automatic diagnosis false alarm in file-manager health check.

## Problem
When a directory is configured without transfer enabled (`transfer_type` is empty), the health check still requires `library_path` and reports:

- `media 的媒体库目录未设置`

This causes confusing "系统健康检查：异常" even though transfer is intentionally not enabled.

## Changes
- In `FileManagerModule.test()`:
  - only validate `library_path` / library existence when `transfer_type` is set
  - keep hard-link same-disk validation under the same condition

This preserves existing checks for active transfer directories while avoiding false positives for monitor-only setups.

Closes #5461

pullRequest.title: fix(agent): parse string-form sites into list for /ai torrent search
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
Fix `/ai` torrent search validation failure when `sites` is passed as a string (e.g. `"[28]"`).

## Root cause
`SearchTorrentsInput.sites` expects `List[int]`, but some agent/tool-call paths pass it as a string, triggering Pydantic validation error:

`Input should be a valid list ... input_value='[28]'`

## Changes
- Add a `field_validator` (before mode) for `sites` in `SearchTorrentsInput`:
  - accept JSON array strings like `"[28]"`
  - accept comma-separated strings like `"28,30"`
  - accept single numeric string like `"28"`
- Keep existing behavior for already-correct list inputs.

Closes #5463

pullRequest.title: fix(subscribe): 修复旧总集数导致的误完成与历史复用偏差
pullRequest.body:
## 变更说明
- 在订阅完成判断前增加总集数兜底刷新，避免旧 `total_episode` 导致误判完成。
- 对订阅历史接口返回的电视剧项统一清零 `total_episode/lack_episode`，复用时触发按最新元数据重算。

## 具体改动
- 在 `SubscribeChain.check_and_handle_existing_media` 中新增预检查纠偏逻辑：
  - 仅电视剧生效
  - `manual_total_episode=1` 时不覆盖
  - 仅当最新总集数大于旧值时更新
  - 同步更新数据库与当前对象，确保本轮判断立即生效
- 在 `GET /subscribe/history/{mtype}` 返回前处理电视剧历史项：
  - `total_episode = 0`
  - `lack_episode = 0`

## 验证
- `python3 -m py_compile app/chain/subscribe.py app/api/endpoints/subscribe.py`

Closes #5465

---
Generated with Codex.

pullRequest.title: fix: 修复电视剧刮削问题
fix(transfer): support "自动" media type in manual organize API
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
Fix manual organize failure when media type is set to "自动" in UI/API.

## Problem
`/api/v1/transfer/manual` converts `type_name` directly with `MediaType(type_name)`.
When users choose "自动" (auto), it is not a valid enum value, causing conversion error and manual organize failure.

## Changes
- In manual transfer endpoint:
  - treat `自动/auto/none` as unspecified type (`None`)
  - keep existing enum conversion for explicit values (`电影`/`电视剧`)
  - return a clear error message for truly unsupported type values

This keeps auto-recognition behavior while preserving validation for invalid inputs.

Closes #5508

pullRequest.title: fix: 插件 remoteEntry 地址补齐 API 前缀，修复子路径代理加载失败
pullRequest.body:
## 关联问题
- closes #5554

## 变更
- 修复 `PluginManager.get_plugin_remote_entry()` 返回的插件静态资源地址
- 原先返回 `/plugin/file/...`，在子路径代理场景下会丢失 API 前缀导致 404
- 现改为 `${settings.API_V1_STR}/plugin/file/...`，与后端路由保持一致

## 验证
- `python -m py_compile app/core/plugin.py` 通过

pullRequest.title: fix: avoid match_season_episodes bound-method argument conflict
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
- fix subscription search completion crash in issue #5567
- call `TorrentHelper.match_season_episodes(...)` via class instead of instance
- this avoids accidental bound-method argument injection that can trigger:
  `TypeError: ... got multiple values for argument 'torrent'`

## Why
The error stack points to the instance call in `SearchChain.__parse_result`.
Using class invocation keeps the call robust and avoids receiver binding side effects.

## Verification
- static check: `python -m py_compile app/chain/search.py`
- logic unchanged except invocation path

Closes #5567
